temporis

Sets a timeout-like duration for a test modifier.

Syntax: temporis

Category

testing

Related

  • [metior](/corpus/metior.html)
  • [repete](/corpus/repete.html)

Examples

examples/corpus/temporis/temporis.fab (canonical · keyword)

Sets a timeout-like duration for a test modifier.

# temporis — timed test modifier
#
# GRAMMAR:
#   testModifier :← 'temporis' integer
#
# EXPECTED OUTPUT:
#   No incipit — declaration or test-runner surface only.
#
# BACKEND:
#   declaration-only test modifier (whitelist: temporis/temporis.fab).
#

proba "timed case" temporis 5 {
    adfirma verum
}

Expected output:

Sources
  • ["examples/corpus/temporis/temporis.fab"]
